ShortDescription.Value: Draw and edit custom buildable land parcels directly on the map. / 直接在地图上绘制和编辑自定义可建造地块。

Publish.LongDescription:
Custom Land Parcel lets you draw, edit, and manage custom buildable land parcels directly on the map.
Features: - Draw custom polygon parcels directly in the map view. - Enable control-node editing to drag parcels, edges, and vertices on terrain. - Create rectangles, create multiple parcels, rename parcels, delete parcels, and merge parcels when needed. - Move parcels and vertices from the UI or with configurable hotkeys. - Insert and delete polygon vertices for finer boundary control. - Customize each parcel independently, including border color, opacity, fill opacity, and line width. - Use the in-game parcel panel with localized English and Simplified Chinese text. - Save parcel geometry, selection, and appearance data with the current save game. - Expand buildable areas based on your custom parcel boundaries. - No manual vanilla map tile purchase is required for areas covered by active custom parcels. - Custom parcel area participates in the city economy and automatically contributes land-area based maintenance cost. - Construction previews outside active custom parcels are blocked with the vanilla city-limit error feedback. - Optionally hide vanilla unlocked tile border visuals. - Vanilla border hiding suppresses the original city boundary mesh only; it does not hide or delete map tile entities. - A newly initialized save starts from a default custom parcel and can align that parcel to the game's initial unlocked area.
Beta note: This mod changes city build boundary and land-economy behavior. Please back up important saves before use. Demolition outside custom parcels may still follow vanilla city-limit behavior.
---
自定义地块允许你直接在地图上绘制、编辑和管理可建造边界。
功能： - 直接在地图中绘制自定义多边形地块。 - 开启控制节点后，可在地形上拖动地块、边线和节点。 - 支持新建矩形、多个地块、重命名、删除地块和按需合并。 - 支持通过 UI 或可配置热键移动地块和节点。 - 支持插入、删除多边形节点，方便精细调整边界。 - 每个地块都可以独立设置边界颜色、线透明度、填充透明度和线宽。 - 提供游戏内地块面板，并支持英文和简体中文界面文本。 - 地块形状、选中状态和外观会跟随当前存档保存。 - 根据自定义地块边界扩展可建造范围。 - 自定义地块覆盖范围内不需要再手动购买原版地图格。 - 自定义地块面积会参与城市经济，并按实际占地自动计入维护费用。 - 超出启用自定义地块范围的建造预览会被阻止，并显示原版城市边界错误反馈。 - 可选择隐藏原版已解锁地块虚线。 - 隐藏原版虚线只会屏蔽原版城市边界网格的显示，不会隐藏或删除地图格实体。 - 新存档初始化时会创建默认自定义地块，并可对齐到游戏初始已解锁区域。
测试版提醒： 本 Mod 会改变城市可建造边界和地块经济逻辑。请在重要存档中使用前先备份。 自定义地块外的拆除行为仍可能遵循游戏原版城市边界规则。

ChangeLog.Value: Initial beta release: custom parcel drawing, control-node editing, multi-parcel merge, save-backed per-parcel styling, vanilla border hiding, no manual vanilla tile purchase inside active parcels, land-area based economy/maintenance integration, and build boundary validation. / 首个测试版：支持自定义地块绘制、控制节点编辑、多地块合并、随存档保存的独立样式、隐藏原版虚线、启用地块内无需手动购买原版地图格、按占地参与经济/维护费，以及建造边界校验。
